---
title: "Common Routing Errors"
author: "Zach Barrett"
date: last-modified
---

:::{.callout-important}
## Disclaimer
This is not an exhaustive list! There are errors you can make that I am not yet
aware of. This is just a list of errors I have seen and instructions on how to
avoid them. When in doubt, ask Michael or one of the TAs!
:::


#
